classes.reasoning: The document explicitly identifies itself as 'INFORMED CONSENT FORM' in the header, includes ICF version number (2.0), contains a consent declaration section with checkboxes, participant and investigator signature blocks, and describes the patient consent process for study BIORCE-CAR-2024-007.

indication: familial high cholesterol in patients who cannot take statins
summary: This is version 2.0 of the Informed Consent Form for study BIORCE-CAR-2024-007, dated 20 September 2024, used at Hospital Universitario La Paz (site ES-02) in Madrid. The document contains a signed consent declaration from participant Maria Garcia Lopez dated 14 August 2024, though the CRA monitoring note identifies data integrity issues including signature date preceding the ICF version date and site name conflicts in the signature block.
content:
INFORMED CONSENT FORM
Study BIORCE-CAR-2024-007
ICF Version 2.0 | Date: 20 September 2024     <-- VERSION 2.0 (liver update)
CONFIDENTIAL

Site: Hospital Universitario La Paz, Madrid   <-- SITE: ES-02
Principal Investigator: Dr. Ignacio Fernandez-Ruiz

===========================================================================
[Pages 1-3 of consent text -- abbreviated for this record]

You are being invited to take part in a clinical research study testing
BRC-883 (Cardanezumab), a monthly injection to lower LDL cholesterol in
patients with familial high cholesterol who cannot take statins.

Key change in this version vs v1.0:
  More frequent liver blood tests added (Weeks 4, 8, 12, 24) following
  a safety update in the ongoing Phase III study.

===========================================================================
SECTION 12 -- CONSENT DECLARATION
===========================================================================

[X] I have read and understood this form (ICF v2.0, 20 Sep 2024). Init: MG

[X] I have had enough time to ask questions; all answered. Init: MG

[X] I understand participation is voluntary. Init: MG

[X] I agree to data collection. Init: MG

[X] I agree to take part. Init: MG


Participant: MARIA GARCIA LOPEZ
                                        [-- DATE CONFLICT BELOW --]
Participant signature: [SIGNED]
Date (DD/MM/YYYY):     14/08/2024    <-- *** SIGNED 14 AUG 2024
                                         BUT ICF VERSION IS DATED
                                         20 SEP 2024 -- IMPOSSIBLE:
                                         PARTICIPANT SIGNED BEFORE
                                         THIS VERSION EXISTED ***

Person taking consent: Dr. Lucia Castillo
                                        [-- SITE NAME CONFLICT --]
Signature: [SIGNED]
Date:      14/08/2024

Site: Hospital Universitario Ramon y Cajal    <-- *** SITE ES-01 IN
                                                  SIGNATURE BLOCK, BUT
                                                  HEADER SAYS ES-02 ***

===========================================================================
CRA QUERY NOTE (monitoring visit 15 October 2024):

Query Q-ES02-ICF-007:
  Issue 1: Participant signature date (14/08/2024) predates ICF version
           date (20/09/2024). Patient was likely consented under ICF v1.0
           and v2.0 form used in error.
  Issue 2: Site name in signature block reads "Ramon y Cajal" (ES-01)
           but patient enrolled at "La Paz" (ES-02). Copy-paste error.
  Status: OPEN -- awaiting investigator clarification by 30 Oct 2024.

===========================================================================
ICF v2.0 | BIORCE-CAR-2024-007 | (C) 2024 Biorce Therapeutics S.L.
===========================================================================
